chart.name: chart.quality.control.points
chart.title: Control Points
chart.dataset:
SELECT COUNT(self.id) AS _passed, (CASE WHEN(translation.message_value = '') THEN _meta._select_title ELSE translation.message_value END) AS _status FROM quality_control_point AS self
JOIN (SELECT cast(_item.value as int) AS _select_value, _item.title AS _select_title FROM meta_select AS _selection JOIN meta_select_item AS _item ON _selection.name = 'quality.control.points.status.select' AND _item.select_id = _selection.id ) AS _meta ON _meta._select_value = self.status_select JOIN meta_translation as translation ON translation.message_key = _meta._select_title AND translation.language = :_language WHERE DATE(self.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDateT) AND DATE(:toDateT) GROUP BY _status ORDER BY _passed ASC

chart.name: chart.quality.controls.total.numbers
chart.title: Number of quality control by team
chart.dataset: SELECT COUNT(*) AS _controls, self.team.name AS _team FROM QualityControl self WHERE DATE(self.createdOn) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDateT) AND DATE(:toDateT) GROUP BY self.team.name ORDER BY self.team.name

chart.name: chart.quality.alerts.total.numbers
chart.title: Number of quality alerts by team
chart.dataset: SELECT COUNT(*) AS _alerts, self.team.name AS _team FROM QualityAlert self WHERE DATE(self.createdOn) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDateT) AND DATE(:toDateT) GROUP BY self.team.name ORDER BY self.team.name

chart.name: chart.quality.alerts.solved.total.numbers
chart.title: Number of solved quality alerts by team
chart.dataset: SELECT COUNT(*) AS _alerts, self.team.name AS _team FROM QualityAlert self WHERE DATE(self.createdOn) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDateT) AND DATE(:toDateT) AND self.statusSelect = 4 GROUP BY self.team.name ORDER BY self.team.name

chart.name: chart.quality.ppm.by.month
chart.title: Non-compliance PPM by month
chart.dataset: WITH counts AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(controlEntry.entry_date_time, 'YYYY-MM') AS _month, SUM(CASE WHEN s.result_select = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS _compliant, SUM(CASE WHEN s.result_select = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS _non_compliant FROM quality_control_entry_sample AS s JOIN quality_control_entry AS controlEntry ON s.control_entry = controlEntry.id JOIN quality_control_plan AS controlPlan ON controlEntry.control_plan = controlPlan.id WHERE controlEntry.status_select = 3 AND controlEntry.related_to_select_id IS NOT NULL AND s.result_select IN (2, 3) AND DATE(controlEntry.entry_date_time) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ( CAST(:relatedToSelect AS varchar) IS NULL OR ( controlPlan.related_to_select = CAST(:relatedToSelect AS varchar) AND ( CAST(:relatedToSelectId AS bigint) IS NULL OR controlPlan.related_to_select_id = CAST(:relatedToSelectId AS bigint) ) ) ) GROUP BY _month ) SELECT _month AS _month, CASE WHEN (_compliant + _non_compliant) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (_non_compliant * 1000000) / (_compliant + _non_compliant) END AS _ppm FROM counts ORDER BY _month

chart.name: chart.quality.improvements.costs.distributions.per.decision
chart.title: Distribution of costs per decision
chart.dataset: SELECT self.decision AS decision,SUM(self.totalCost) AS total_cost FROM ( SELECT _qi_decision.name AS decision,SUM(_qi_resolution_decision.total_cost) AS totalCost FROM quality_qi_resolution_decision AS _qi_resolution_decision LEFT JOIN quality_qi_decision _qi_decision ON _qi_decision.id = _qi_resolution_decision.qi_decision LEFT JOIN quality_qi_resolution _qi_resolution ON _qi_resolution.id = _qi_resolution_decision.qi_resolution LEFT JOIN quality_quality_improvement _quality_improvement ON _quality_improvement.qi_resolution = _qi_resolution.id WHERE _quality_improvement.id = :id GROUP BY _qi_decision.name UNION ALL SELECT _qi_decision.name AS decision,SUM(_qi_task.total_cost) AS totalCost FROM ical_event AS _qi_task LEFT JOIN quality_qi_decision _qi_decision ON _qi_decision.id = _qi_task.qi_decision LEFT JOIN quality_qi_analysis _qi_analysis ON _qi_analysis.id = _qi_task.qi_analysis LEFT JOIN quality_quality_improvement _quality_improvement ON _quality_improvement.qi_analysis = _qi_analysis.id WHERE _quality_improvement.id = :id GROUP BY _qi_decision.name ) AS self GROUP BY self.decision

custom.name: quality.improvements.costs.lists.per.decision
custom.title: Costs list per decision
custom.dataset: SELECT self.decision AS decision,SUM(self.fixedAmount) AS fixed_amount,SUM(self.directCost) AS direct_cost,SUM(self.totalCost) AS total_cost FROM ( SELECT _qi_decision.name AS decision,SUM(_qi_resolution_decision.fixed_amount) AS fixedAmount,SUM(_qi_resolution_decision.direct_cost) AS directCost,SUM(_qi_resolution_decision.total_cost) AS totalCost FROM quality_qi_resolution_decision AS _qi_resolution_decision LEFT JOIN quality_qi_decision _qi_decision ON _qi_decision.id = _qi_resolution_decision.qi_decision LEFT JOIN quality_qi_resolution _qi_resolution ON _qi_resolution.id = _qi_resolution_decision.qi_resolution LEFT JOIN quality_quality_improvement _quality_improvement ON _quality_improvement.qi_resolution = _qi_resolution.id WHERE _quality_improvement.id = :id GROUP BY _qi_decision.name UNION ALL SELECT _qi_decision.name AS decision,SUM(_qi_task.fixed_amount) AS fixedAmount,SUM(_qi_task.direct_cost) AS directCost,SUM(_qi_task.total_cost) AS totalCost FROM ical_event AS _qi_task LEFT JOIN quality_qi_decision _qi_decision ON _qi_decision.id = _qi_task.qi_decision LEFT JOIN quality_qi_analysis _qi_analysis ON _qi_analysis.id = _qi_task.qi_analysis LEFT JOIN quality_quality_improvement _quality_improvement ON _quality_improvement.qi_analysis = _qi_analysis.id WHERE _quality_improvement.id = :id GROUP BY _qi_decision.name ) AS self GROUP BY self.decision
